title: Expressions, Decisions, and Iteration · Language Lens: Conditional Branches
summary: Route support cases through explicit rules and iterate changing record sets without truthiness or termination defects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js conditional branches increment in a transparent support-case routing engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Express mutually exclusive branches, guard clauses, and exhaustive fallbacks without unreachable paths.
Use truthiness only when every falsy value shares the same domain meaning and otherwise write explicit guards.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
